narrative:
Cleveland-Heights municipal court district has 34,282 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 44.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 40.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +18.6% D−R vs +54.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
